reason: Successfully executed all test steps to verify agent can use GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing multiple agents including "QA-20260419-154601-t5xk" with "idle" status
Found and clicked the "QA-20260419-154601-t5xk" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened, showing agent status as "idle" which meets the requirement (running or idle)
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle", which is acceptable
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message input accepted, agent transitioned to "working" status, and message appeared in chat
GitHub account access card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access — Card displayed with GitHub account already selected/checked, requiring confirmation
Granted GitHub account access by clicking "Allow Access" button — Permission granted, agent resumed working and displayed Bash tool call
API permission dialog appeared asking to allow GitHub GET /user request — Dialog displayed with multiple permission options, selected "Allow Once"
Waited for agent response (approximately 56 seconds total, well within 4-minute limit) — Agent completed work after 43 seconds of processing
Verified response includes GitHub username — Agent returned clear message: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." with username displayed in bold
Took screenshot of final result — Full page screenshot captured showing agent response with GitHub username "yiw190"
